name: Irish Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a square pan, 9 x 9 x 3/4 inches.
3. Mix flour, sugar, salt, egg yolks, butter, and lemon rind in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Divide the mixture into two parts. Press one part into the bottom of the greased pan.
5. In a separate bowl, mix applesauce, cinnamon, cloves, and spread evenly over the dough in the pan.
6. Sprinkle the remaining dough over the applesauce.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm topped with whipped cream, ice cream, or lemon sauce.
